name: shopping-list-by-store
_note: cooking.shopping-list-by-store normalizes each shopping-list item's quantity to a canonical unit (mass→g, volume→ml, else count), consolidates duplicate (name, unit) rows by summing, and groups by store/aisle. totalItems (distinct after consolidation) is always <= consolidatedFrom (raw row count). With an empty list it returns ok:true with zero stores (degrade-graceful). State-backed, per-user; wrapped in try/catch (handler_error on any failure, never throws). Path-3 LENS_ACTIONS macro — the real unit-conversion + consolidation math (1lb+200g flour → 653.6g) is pinned in server/tests/cooking-lens-macros.test.js.
